atlas.description: Atlas Cloud is a full-modal AI inference platform that gives developers a single AI API to access video generation, image generation, and LLM APIs. Instead of managing multiple vendor integrations, you connect once and get unified access to 300+ curated models across all modalities. Check out Atlas Cloud's new coding plan promotion for more budget-friendly API access.

errors.refreshFailed: Failed to check for updates. Check your network connection and try again.
errors.runtimeUpdatedRefreshFailed: Runtime updated, but failed to refresh provider status.

hints.backgroundStatus: {{runtime}} status will be checked in the background.
hints.codexApiKeyFallback: {{hint}} API key fallback is available if you switch auth mode.
hints.codexAutoApiKey: {{hint}} Auto will keep using the API key until ChatGPT is connected.
hints.codexFinishLogin: Finish ChatGPT login in the browser. Enter the shown code if prompted.
hints.codexNoActiveLogin: Usage limits appear only after Codex CLI sees an active ChatGPT account. Right now it reports no active ChatGPT login.
hints.codexNoActiveManagedSession: Usage limits appear only after Codex CLI sees an active ChatGPT account. Local Codex account data exists, but no active managed session is selected right now.
hints.codexReconnectNeeded: Usage limits appear only after Codex refreshes the currently selected ChatGPT session. Right now the local session needs reconnect.
hints.firstCheckSlow: First check may take up to 30 seconds
hints.loginRequiredForTeams: Browsing sessions and projects works without login. Login is only needed to run agent teams.
hints.troubleshootTitle: If you're sure you're logged in, try these steps:

provider.connectToGetStarted: Connect a provider to get started
provider.configuredLocalTitle: Local OpenCode routes imported from your OpenCode config.
provider.freeModelsTitle: OpenCode includes free model options such as Big Pickle when available in your setup. OpenRouter through OpenCode can also expose free models, but not every OpenCode/OpenRouter model is free. Availability and limits may change.
provider.modelsUnavailable: Models unavailable for this runtime build
provider.verifiedTitle: OpenCode routes with a successful execution proof.

quickConnect.claudeConnected: Connected through your local Claude CLI session.
quickConnect.claudeDescription: Use your Claude plan through the Claude CLI.
quickConnect.codexConnected: Connected through your local Codex CLI session.
quickConnect.codexDescription: Use your ChatGPT plan through the Codex CLI.
quickConnect.copilotDescription: Use GitHub Copilot through OpenCode. Agent Teams verifies a compatible model for your plan, including Copilot Free.
quickConnect.cursorDescription: Use your Cursor subscription through the managed OpenCode Cursor plugin.
quickConnect.description: Connect any plans you use, then mix them in the same Agent Team.
quickConnect.installOpenCodeFirst: Install OpenCode to browse and connect these providers
quickConnect.kimiDescription: Use a Kimi Code membership key through OpenCode and consume membership quota.
quickConnect.kiroDescription: Use your Kiro subscription through the managed OpenCode Kiro plugin.
quickConnect.kiroSetupDescription: Agent Teams installs the official Kiro CLI, opens browser sign-in, and verifies kiro/auto through OpenCode.
quickConnect.miniMaxDescription: Use the dedicated MiniMax Token Plan quota through OpenCode.
quickConnect.xiaomiDescription: Use Xiaomi MiMo Token Plan quota through the regional OpenCode endpoint shown in your plan dashboard.
quickConnect.openAiApiConnected: Available through Codex. OpenCode currently uses API billing.
quickConnect.openAiConnectCodex: Connect Codex for Plus/Pro, or use OpenCode as an additional route.
quickConnect.openAiConnectedBoth: Available through Codex and also connected through OpenCode.
quickConnect.openAiViaCodex: Already available through Codex. OpenCode is optional.
quickConnect.openCodeChecking: Checking that OpenCode is installed and ready...
quickConnect.openCodeError: OpenCode could not start. Repair or reinstall it, then retry.
quickConnect.openCodeRequired: Install OpenCode to connect and use these providers with Agent Teams.
quickConnect.providerStatusError: Could not load OpenCode provider status. Your saved credentials were not changed.
quickConnect.xiaomiSetupDescription: Paste the Dedicated Base URL from your Token Plan page. Agent Teams detects the correct OpenCode provider automatically.
quickConnect.xiaomiBaseUrlHint: Copy either the OpenAI-compatible /v1 URL or the Anthropic-compatible /anthropic URL. Your API key is entered securely in the next step.
quickConnect.xiaomiRegionAutomatic: No region selection needed - it is detected from the URL.
quickConnect.superGrokDescription: Use your SuperGrok subscription through OpenCode OAuth.
quickConnect.title: Optional providers & plans
quickConnect.zaiDescription: Use the dedicated Z.AI Coding Plan quota through OpenCode.

runtime.configuredHealthCheckFailed: The configured {{runtime}} failed its startup health check.
runtime.foundButFailed: {{runtime}} was found but failed to start
runtime.healthCheckFailedDescription: The app found the configured {{runtime}}, but its startup health check failed. Repair or reinstall it, then retry.
runtime.installRequiredDescription: {{runtime}} is required for team provisioning and session management. Install it to get started.

runtimeInstall.codexTitle: Install Codex CLI into app data
runtimeInstall.openCodeTitle: Install OpenCode runtime into app data

troubleshoot.authStatusCommand: your configured CLI auth status command
troubleshoot.reloginPrefix: If it says logged in but the app doesn't see it, try:
troubleshoot.sameRuntime: Make sure the CLI in your terminal is the same runtime the app uses
troubleshoot.statusCacheHint: - sometimes the status is cached for a few seconds

warnings.multipleApiKeysMissing: One or more providers are set to API key mode, but no API key is configured. Open Manage Providers to add keys or switch the connection mode.
warnings.multipleApiKeysNeedAttention: One or more providers are set to API key mode and need attention. Open Manage Providers to review saved keys or switch the connection mode.
warnings.notAuthenticated: {{runtime}} is installed but you are not authenticated. Login is required for team provisioning and AI features.
warnings.singleApiKeyMissing: {{provider}} is set to API key mode, but no API key is configured. Open Manage Providers to add a key or switch the connection mode.
warnings.singleApiKeyNeedsAttention: {{provider}} is set to API key mode, but it is not connected. Open Manage Providers to review the saved key or switch the connection mode.

recentProjects.emptyDescription: Recent agent activity will appear here.
recentProjects.title: Recent Projects

windowsAdmin.title: Windows Administrator mode recommended
windowsAdmin.description: OpenCode runtime checks can time out when Agent Teams AI is not elevated. Restart the app with Run as administrator before launching OpenCode teams.

webPreview.title: Open the desktop app for full functionality
webPreview.description: The browser version is still in development. Project actions, integrations, and live status updates may be limited here. Use the desktop app to access all features reliably.

billingSplit.apiBillableHelp: Actual provider or gateway API cost when reported by the runtime.
billingSplit.apiEquivalentHelp: Pricing-table shadow estimate across collected usage. This is not a subscription bill.
billingSplit.freeUsageHelp: Usage explicitly marked as free by the runtime or importer.
billingSplit.legacyUnclassifiedHelp: Older imported requests without explicit billing mode. They are counted separately to avoid mixing subscription and API billing.
billingSplit.subscriptionUsageHelp: Requests and tokens attributed to subscription mode. No billable API dollars are counted for this bucket.

burnRate.basis: Based on the last {{days}} visible days

dateRange.selectRange: Select a start and end date

metrics.billingHelp: Billable shows actual provider or gateway API cost only. Subscription usage is counted when a run has billingMode=subscription. API-equivalent is a pricing-table shadow estimate for comparison, not a subscription bill.
